description_short: Add breathable, cooling comfort and responsive support to your old mattress with the SleepyCat Aeroflow Foam Topper - no replacement needed.

construction_layers.name: Aeroflow Foam
construction_layers.notes: Breathable, cooling comfort with ventilation channels.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash on delicate cycle with cold water and mild detergent.

proprietary_tech.name: Aeroflow Transition Foam
proprietary_tech.description: Enhances breathability and minimizes moisture buildup.

proprietary_tech.name: Ventilation Channels
proprietary_tech.description: Allows air to circulate freely to reduce heat and moisture.

faq_specs.question: What is the feel of the Aeroflow mattress topper?
faq_specs.answer: The Aeroflow mattress topper has a soft feel, providing cooling comfort and breathable support.

faq_specs.question: What should I do if I choose a custom size?
faq_specs.answer: Custom size mattresses are made to order and are non-returnable.

faq_specs.question: How long does it take for the topper to regain its shape after unboxing?
faq_specs.answer: Allow 24-48 hours for the topper to fully regain its shape.
